variant: should i use minoxidil or finasteride for hair loss? compare them

request.message: should i use minoxidil or finasteride for hair loss? compare them

response_body.response: the evidence is clear: they work differently. minoxidil stimulates growth, finasteride stops loss by blocking DHT. most effective protocols combine both. at 19 with early signs, you'd want to identify your stage first (mature hairline vs actual recession). if it's progressing, finasteride is the foundation because it addresses the hormone driving loss. minoxidil stacks on top for growth stimulation. neither alone is the full answer. talk to a doctor before starting either, especially finasteride.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.

options.name: minoxidil
pros: stimulates blood flow to follicles, increases thickness
works for early thinning or recession
cons: growth stimulator only, doesn't block DHT
requires ongoing use to maintain gains

options.name: finasteride
pros: blocks DHT conversion, stops the root cause
cons: DHT blocker only, doesn't stimulate new growth
need to rule out contraindications first
